hero.label: Free Growth Audit
hero.description: Tell us where you're at. We'll review your offer, content and funnel, then send back a clear read on what's costing you customers - and what to fix first. No pitch, no commitment.

form.privacy: We only use this to run your audit. No spam, no list.

thanks.title: Your audit is on its way.
thanks.body: Thanks - we've got your details. We'll review your offer, content and funnel and get back to you within one business day with where you're losing money and what to do first.
steps: We review your offer, content and current funnel.
We send back a short written read - the biggest leaks first.
If it's a fit, we book a call. If not, the audit is still yours to keep.

panel.heading: What you get

items.title: Where you're losing money
items.text: A clear read on the leaks in your offer, content and funnel - ranked by what's costing you the most.

items.title: A do-this-first plan
items.text: The one or two moves that will move revenue fastest, with the why behind each.

items.title: No commitment
items.text: It's free and yours to keep. If we're not the right fit, we'll tell you straight.

panel.metricCap: generated for the businesses we've worked with. Yours could be next.
